product.body_html:
Your body already makes its own pain-relief molecule. The problem is it can't keep up with chronic pain — so it runs out. This replenishes it.

PEA — Palmitoylethanolamide — is not a drug. It's a fatty acid amide your body naturally produces in response to injury and inflammation. In healthy people with acute pain, the body ramps up PEA production to calm mast cells, quieten overactive glial cells in the nervous system, and shut down the pain signal at its source. But in people with chronic pain — nerve pain, sciatica, fibromyalgia, neuropathy, persistent joint inflammation — the body can't produce enough PEA to manage the ongoing inflammatory load. The pain signal stays on. Supplementing with PEA restores what chronic pain drains away.

Romira PEA delivers 600mg per dose — the amount used in clinical trials — and works through a mechanism completely separate from opioids, NSAIDs, or cannabis. There's no high, no dependency, no stomach bleeding, no tolerance buildup. PEA works by modulating the cells that amplify pain, not by blocking pain receptors or masking symptoms. Over 30 human clinical trials show PEA reduces chronic pain scores significantly, often within 2-4 weeks of daily use. For anyone who has tried NSAIDs and doesn't want to stay on them long-term, PEA is one of the most evidence-backed natural alternatives available.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ Reduces chronic nerve pain — burning, stabbing, shooting sensations
  • ✓ Shown effective for sciatica, fibromyalgia, and neuropathy
  • ✓ Modulates mast cells and glial cells — addresses pain at the source
  • ✓ Non-addictive, non-psychoactive — no opioid mechanism
  • ✓ No stomach damage unlike ibuprofen and NSAIDs taken long-term
  • ✓ 600mg clinical dose — matches the amount used in trials
  • ✓ Backed by 30+ human clinical studies

Formulation

600mg Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) per capsule — ultra-micronised form for optimal absorption. No synthetic analgesics. No fillers. Suitable for long-term daily use.

Who It's For

People with chronic nerve pain, sciatica, fibromyalgia, joint inflammation, or anyone looking for a non-drug, non-addictive approach to managing persistent pain.

Stop white-knuckling through daily pain — try the molecule your body already trusts, in the clinical dose that works.
